recommendations.title: House of Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: Deranged scientist, Gustav Niemann, escapes from prison and overtakes the director of a traveling chamber of horrors, soon reviving the infamous Count Dracula, the frozen Frankenstein Monster, and the Wolf Man.

recommendations.title: Island of Lost Souls
recommendations.overview: An obsessed scientist conducts profane experiments in evolution, eventually establishing himself as the self-styled demigod to a race of mutated, half-human abominations.

recommendations.title: The Ghost of Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: Frankenstein's unscrupulous colleague, Dr. Bohmer, plans to transplant Ygor's brain so he can rule the world using the monster's body, but the plan goes sour when he turns malevolent and goes on a rampage.

recommendations.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
recommendations.overview: Count Dracula, a 15th-century prince, is condemned to live off the blood of the living for eternity. Young lawyer Jonathan Harker is sent to Dracula's castle to finalise a land deal, but when the Count sees a photo of Harker's fiancée, Mina, the spit

recommendations.title: Dracula
recommendations.overview: A British estate agent travels to Transylvania to meet the mysterious Count Dracula, who is interested in leasing a London castle. After Dracula enslaves the agent and drives him to insanity, the pair return to London together, where Dracula, a secre

recommendations.title: Drácula
recommendations.overview: A British estate agent travels to Transylvania to meet the mysterious Count Dracula, who is interested in leasing a London castle. After Dracula enslaves the agent and drives him to insanity, the pair return to London together, where Dracula, a secre

recommendations.title: Real Steel
recommendations.overview: Charlie Kenton is a washed-up fighter who retired from the ring when robots took over the sport. After his robot is trashed, he reluctantly teams up with his estranged son to rebuild and train an unlikely contender.

recommendations.title: Nosferatu the Vampyre
recommendations.overview: A real estate agent leaves behind his beautiful wife to go to Transylvania to visit the mysterious Count Dracula and formalize the purchase of a property in Wismar.

recommendations.title: Bud Abbott and Lou Costello Meet Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: The Wolf Man tries to warn a dimwitted porter that Dracula wants his brain for Frankenstein monster's body.

recommendations.title: Count Dracula
recommendations.overview: A faithful adaptation of the classic tale portrays Dracula as an old man who grows younger whenever he dines on the blood of young maidens.
